testFuzz_get_nonEmpty_succeeds(address,u.details: Test that the gas paying token correctly gets values from storage when set.

testFuzz_setGetWithSanitize_succeeds(add.details: Test that the gas paying token correctly sets values in storage when input name and symbol are strings.

testFuzz_set_succeeds(address,uint8,byte.details: Test that the gas paying token correctly sets values in storage.

test_get_empty_succeeds().details: Test that the gas paying token returns values associated with Ether when unset.

test_sanitize_empty_succeeds().details: Test that `sanitize` works as expected when the input string is empty.

test_sanitize_stringTooLong_fails(string.details: Test that `sanitize` fails when the input string is too long.

@dev Test that the gas paying token correctly gets values from storage when set.
